history.en: Native to tropical forests of southern Mexico and Central America. Monstera became a modern design icon thanks to its dramatic, fenestrated leaves and architectural silhouette.
history.zh: 原产墨西哥南部与中美洲雨林。因独特的“开孔”叶片与建筑感轮廓而成为家居设计的标志性观叶植物。

habit.en: A climbing aroid with aerial roots. Grows toward light and appreciates a support pole; let the top layer of soil dry slightly between waterings.
habit.zh: 攀援型天南星科植物，会长出气生根并向光生长。适合立柱支撑；浇水遵循“表土稍干再浇”。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Originating from the Solomon Islands, pothos became one of the most loved beginner houseplants for its forgiving nature and elegant trailing vines.
history.zh: 原产所罗门群岛。凭借耐养、适应性强与优雅的垂吊藤蔓，成为许多人的入门级室内绿植。

habit.en: A fast-growing trailing or climbing vine. Tolerates low light, but variegation looks best in brighter indirect light; water when the top soil is dry.
habit.zh: 生长迅速的垂吊/攀援藤本。耐弱光，但在更明亮的散射光下斑纹更漂亮；表土干了再浇水。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Native to West Africa, snake plant is famous for thriving on neglect. It has long been grown as a durable indoor plant and is still a modern favorite.
history.zh: 原产西非。以“耐旱、耐养、几乎不需要操心”而闻名，是经典且经久不衰的室内绿植。

habit.en: An upright, drought-tolerant plant with thick leaves that store water. Prefer bright indirect light but adapts to low light; avoid frequent watering.
habit.zh: 直立生长，叶片厚实可储水，耐旱。喜欢明亮散射光，也能适应弱光；浇水宁少勿多。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Native to southern Africa, spider plant became popular as a resilient hanging plant. Its charming “spiderettes” make it easy to propagate and share.
history.zh: 原产非洲南部。因耐养、适合吊盆以及会长出可繁殖的“小吊兰”而广受欢迎，也很适合分享给朋友。

habit.en: A clumping plant with arching leaves and runners that produce plantlets. Keep lightly moist, avoid soggy soil, and rotate for even growth.
habit.zh: 丛生型，叶片拱形下垂，会抽匍匐茎结出小株。土壤保持微湿但不积水，适度转盆让生长更均匀。

notes.en: Generally considered pet-safe, but avoid letting pets chew on leaves.
notes.zh: 通常认为对宠物友好，但仍建议避免啃咬叶片。

history.en: Native to West Africa, the fiddle-leaf fig rose to fame in contemporary interior design for its large, sculptural leaves and tree-like form.
history.zh: 原产西非。因大而有雕塑感的叶片与树形姿态而在现代室内设计中走红，被称为“空间气质担当”。

habit.en: An upright woody plant that prefers stable conditions. Bright indirect light and consistent watering help it avoid leaf drop; avoid frequent moves and drafts.
habit.zh: 木质直立生长，偏爱稳定环境。明亮散射光与规律浇水有助于减少落叶；尽量避免频繁挪动与冷风直吹。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Native to eastern Africa, ZZ plant became a go-to office plant thanks to its tolerance of low light and irregular watering.
history.zh: 原产非洲东部。因耐阴、耐旱、适合忙碌人群与办公室环境而广受欢迎。

habit.en: A slow-growing plant with rhizomes that store water. Let the pot dry out between waterings; brighter indirect light encourages fuller growth.
habit.zh: 生长偏慢，地下根茎可储水。浇水要等盆土干透再浇；更明亮的散射光能让株型更饱满。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Native to tropical regions of the Americas, peace lily became a classic indoor plant thanks to its glossy leaves and elegant white spathes.
history.zh: 原产热带美洲。因油亮叶片与优雅的白色佛焰苞而成为经典室内绿植，常被用来营造安静、清洁的空间氛围。

habit.en: A shade-tolerant plant that enjoys consistent moisture. It will droop slightly when thirsty; keep it evenly damp but never soggy.
habit.zh: 耐阴，喜欢稳定的水分。缺水时会轻微下垂作为“提醒”；保持土壤均匀湿润但不要积水。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Aloe has been cultivated for centuries and is cherished for its sculptural rosettes and historic use in skin care traditions.
history.zh: 芦荟栽培历史悠久，因雕塑感的莲座叶形与传统护肤用途而广为人知。

habit.en: A drought-tolerant succulent that stores water in its leaves. Let the pot dry out completely between waterings and give it plenty of light.
habit.zh: 耐旱的多肉植物，叶片可储水。浇水要等盆土完全干透再浇，并给予充足光照。

nativeRange.zh: 常被认为原产阿拉伯半岛；现广泛栽培

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Loved for its wide, striped leaves, orbifolia became a design favorite in modern homes — a living piece of pattern and texture.
history.zh: 因宽大带纹理的叶片而深受喜爱，在现代家居中常被当作“活的纹理与图案”来点亮空间。

habit.en: Prefers steady warmth and higher humidity. Keep the soil lightly moist and avoid harsh sun or dry drafts.
habit.zh: 偏爱稳定温暖与较高湿度。土壤保持微湿，避免强烈日晒与干燥冷风。

nativeRange.zh: 常被认为原产玻利维亚

notes.en: Generally considered pet-safe, but avoid letting pets chew on leaves.
notes.zh: 通常认为对宠物友好，但仍建议避免啃咬叶片。

history.en: A modern cult favorite, pilea is celebrated for its coin-shaped leaves and easy propagation — a plant made to share.
history.zh: 因“硬币叶”造型与易繁殖而成为近年人气绿植，也很适合分株分享给朋友。

habit.en: Grows upright with round leaves on long petioles. Rotate often for symmetry; water when the top soil starts to dry.
habit.zh: 直立生长，圆叶长柄。勤转盆更对称；表土开始变干时再浇水。

notes.en: Generally considered pet-safe, but avoid letting pets chew on leaves.
notes.zh: 通常认为对宠物友好，但仍建议避免啃咬叶片。

history.en: With thick, glossy leaves, rubber plant became a staple of mid‑century interiors and remains a timeless statement plant.
history.zh: 以厚实油亮的叶片著称，曾是中世纪现代风格家居的常驻角色，如今依然是经典的“气场型”绿植。

habit.en: An upright tree-like plant that enjoys stable light and occasional wiping of leaves. Water when the top layers dry.
habit.zh: 树状直立生长，喜欢稳定光照，叶面可偶尔擦拭除尘。浇水遵循“表层干了再浇”。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Dragon tree is prized for its minimal, architectural silhouette and tolerance of indoor conditions, making it a popular office companion.
history.zh: 因线条感强、极简且耐室内环境而受欢迎，是办公室与现代空间常见的“耐心型”绿植。

habit.en: Slow-growing with narrow leaves. Let the pot dry partway between waterings; too much water is a common mistake.
habit.zh: 生长偏慢，叶片细长。浇水要等盆土部分干燥再浇；最常见的错误是浇水过勤。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: A beloved trailing plant in homes and studios, heartleaf philodendron is known for its soft heart-shaped leaves and forgiving nature.
history.zh: 家居与工作室常见的垂吊绿植，以柔软的心形叶与好养而著称。

habit.en: A trailing vine that can climb with support. Water when the top soil dries and pinch tips for bushier growth.
habit.zh: 垂吊藤本，也可攀援。表土干了再浇，适度摘心可促进更茂密的分枝。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Hoya has long been grown for its thick leaves and fragrant star-shaped blooms — a patient plant with a rewarding payoff.
history.zh: 球兰因厚叶与带香气的星形花而被喜爱，是一类“慢热但很值得”的观花观叶植物。

habit.en: A climbing or trailing plant with succulent-like leaves. Let it dry slightly between waterings and avoid disturbing the roots too often.
habit.zh: 攀援/垂吊，叶片略肉质。浇水让盆土略干再浇，尽量避免频繁折腾根系。

notes.en: Generally considered pet-safe, but avoid letting pets chew on leaves.
notes.zh: 通常认为对宠物友好，但仍建议避免啃咬叶片。

history.en: Ferns have decorated homes for generations. Boston fern remains a favorite for its soft texture and lush, classic look.
history.zh: 蕨类装点家居已久。波士顿蕨以柔软的质感与丰盛的羽状叶片成为经典之选。

habit.en: Enjoys humidity and evenly moist soil. Dry air can cause crispy tips; misting and a consistent routine help.
habit.zh: 喜欢湿度与均匀水分。空气太干容易“焦尖”；喷雾增湿与规律养护会更稳定。

nativeRange.zh: 热带与亚热带美洲（广泛栽培）

notes.en: Generally considered pet-safe, but avoid letting pets chew on leaves.
notes.zh: 通常认为对宠物友好，但仍建议避免啃咬叶片。

history.en: Phalaenopsis orchids are widely loved for long-lasting blooms and elegant arching spikes — a symbol of calm, refined beauty.
history.zh: 蝴蝶兰以花期长、花梗优雅而广受欢迎，常被视为沉静而精致的美的象征。

habit.en: An epiphytic orchid that prefers airflow around its roots. Water thoroughly, then let it drain well; avoid leaving water in the crown.
habit.zh: 附生兰，根系需要通风。浇水要浇透并充分沥干；避免叶心积水。

notes.en: Generally considered pet-safe, but avoid letting pets chew on leaves.
notes.zh: 通常认为对宠物友好，但仍建议避免啃咬叶片。

history.en: A classic succulent often passed down as a long-lived houseplant. Jade plant is admired for its sturdy form and glossy leaves.
history.zh: 常被当作“越养越久”的多肉绿植传承分享，因株型稳重、叶片油亮而受喜爱。

habit.en: A slow-growing succulent with woody stems. Let it dry out between waterings and give it brighter light for compact growth.
habit.zh: 木质化茎干的多肉，生长偏慢。浇水等干透再浇；光照更足株型更紧凑。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。

history.en: Anthurium became a beloved gift plant for its long-lasting colorful spathes and glossy, heart-shaped leaves.
history.zh: 因彩色佛焰苞花期长、叶片油亮且心形而常被当作礼赠植物，也很适合做桌面点睛。

habit.en: Prefers warmth and humidity. Keep it evenly moist with good drainage; avoid cold drafts and harsh sun.
habit.zh: 喜欢温暖与湿度。土壤保持均匀湿润且排水良好；避免冷风与强烈日晒。

notes.en: Not considered pet-safe; keep out of reach of cats and dogs.
notes.zh: 对宠物不友好；建议远离猫狗，避免误食。
